steps.title: Limit the group to tulips
steps.content: The phrase given that the flower is a tulip means the denominator is the total number of tulips, not the total number of flowers.

steps.title: Compute the conditional probability
steps.content:
From the tulip row, site A has $35$ tulips out of $50$ total tulips.
$$\frac{35}{50}=\frac{7}{10}=0.7$$
The answer is 0.7.
